title: Grammitis moranii
taxonomy: Grammitis moranii is classified as a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. This family is a group of vascular plants commonly known as polypods or true ferns. Grammitis moranii is further classified under the genus Grammitis, which consists of small, delicate ferns. The species is native to Central and South America and is often found in humid, tropical environments. Grammitis moranii is also known as the Moran's Grammitis.
uses: Grammitis moranii is a species of fern known for its potential medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its benefits.
